briefing: KOSPI closed sharply lower at 5,405.75 (-6.49%) on March 23, 2026, amid escalating US-Iran tensions and energy supply fears. The KRW/USD exchange rate hit a 17-year low of 1,517.3. A sell-side sidecar was triggered on the Korea Exchange. Major tech stocks like Samsung and SK hynix saw significant declines of 6.42% and 7.75% respectively.
